## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential white label link building partnership between GrowthX.ai and Dofollow for B2B SaaS clients.](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai seeks high-quality, organic link building (10-25 links/month) for B2B SaaS clients](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Dofollow offers premium, B2B SaaS-focused link building with fresh outreach and no contracts](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Pricing ranges from $2,500-$4,000+/month based on DR, with 4-6 links/month (DR 60-90+)](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [White label partnership requires separate budgets per client project for meaningful impact](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Link Building Needs

  - [Handles growth marketing, primarily content and SEO, for B2B SaaS clients](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Seeking white label link building partnership for 10-25 links/month per client](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Clients include companies like Ramp, Webflow, and cybersecurity firms](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Ready to start immediately, with success defined by quality links and improved rankings](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

### Dofollow's Link Building Approach

  - [Specializes in B2B SaaS link building with fresh outreach for each project](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Focuses on high-quality, contextual links from authoritative websites (DR 60-90+)](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Prioritizes landing pages but recommends 30-70 split with informational content](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Provides transparent reporting and feedback loop through account manager and portal](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)

### Pricing and Packages

  - [Premium pricing based on DR, ranging from $2,500-$4,000+/month](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Starter package: 4-6 links/month (DR 60-90+) for $4,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Budget-friendly option: $2,500/month with DR capped at 69](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Subscription model with monthly payments and no long-term contracts](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

### White Label Considerations

  - [Separate budgets required for each client project](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [No direct competition with white label partners' clients](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Emphasis on setting realistic expectations and boundaries with end clients](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)

### AI and Link Building

  - [Dofollow continuously monitors AI's impact on link building](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [No significant changes to their approach yet, but staying informed](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Upcoming webinar on May 14th to discuss AI and link building study results](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Anna to send pricing decks, link examples, and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Anna to follow up in a week to check on Jason's decision](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [Jason to review materials and consider fit for GrowthX.ai's clients](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Jason to potentially attend Dofollow's AI and link building webinar on May 14th](https://fathom.video/share/rewYHUoki5gtv9fGsRcnztx5kFkgfsuU?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
